description: You are a supply chain analyst modeling the logistics for a new product, the 'Global Workbench'. Model a unit process named 'Global Workbench Assembly' using the USLCI database (~/LCA_Imports/uslci_database.zip). The assembly requires a Wood Component (50 kg transported 300 km by truck) and a Steel Component (5 kg transported 8,000 km by ocean freighter and 400 km by truck). Incorporate the total transport work in ton*km for both truck and ocean transport flows within the process. Export the product system calculation results using the TRACI 2.1 impact assessment method to ~/LCA_Results/workbench_results.csv.
